name: openclaw-spawner
description: Enables an Openclaw agent to spawn sub-agents (child Openclaw instances) when a task is too large, complex, or parallel to handle alone.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: API key for Anthropic (Claude models). Required when model= starts with 'anthropic/'.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: API key for OpenAI. Required when model= starts with 'openai/'.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: API key for Google Gemini. Required when model= starts with 'gemini/'.

GROQ_API_KEY.description: API key for Groq. Required when model= starts with 'groq/'.

MISTRAL_API_KEY.description: API key for Mistral AI. Required when model= starts with 'mistral/'.

AZURE_API_KEY.description: API key for Azure OpenAI. Required when model= starts with 'azure/'.

AZURE_API_BASE.description: Base URL for Azure OpenAI endpoint. Required when model= starts with 'azure/'.

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS access key for Bedrock. Required when model= starts with 'bedrock/'.

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS secret key for Bedrock. Required when model= starts with 'bedrock/'.

env_note: At least one provider API key is required at runtime. Which key depends on the model= argument passed to spawn_openclaw(). Ollama (model='ollama/...') requires no key.

security.credentials: Provider API keys are read from environment variables only. Never embed keys in payloads or snapshots.
security.filesystem: Passing file-access tools to child agents grants them read/write access to arbitrary paths. Only pass tools you trust.
security.data_exposure: progress_so_far is transmitted to the provider API and injected into the child agent's context. Sanitize snapshots and strip secrets before spawning.

changelog.2.0.0: Replaced Anthropic SDK with LiteLLM for multi-provider support. Added model= parameter. spawn_openclaw_async no longer takes a client argument. Tools must now be in OpenAI function-call format.
changelog.1.0.0: Initial release. Anthropic-only via anthropic SDK.
